title: Chapter 27

I used to call it a club, but I’ve been informed that everyone here calls it a pub, so who am I to go against the flow? Or more like a glare. It’s totally unfair that he gets to communicate so much with a mere glance. “Hey, bitches, why aren’t you raising your glasses for my lordship’s toast?” “We get it, Remi, you won.” Cecily leans back against her chair. “You’ve been making a hundred and one speeches and toasts to inform us of the fact.” “You zip it, nerd. You bitches are jealous of me and it totally shows on your snobbish faces. Anni, Glyn!
